rationale: Keep: the cited paper is directly about online review valence/volume, positivity patterns, and links to sales in Amazon/bn.com book data, which overlaps core constructs in the citing paper (polarity, positive imbalance, and rating informativeness for outcomes such as sales). The citing note explicitly says it extends prior mostly single-platform (especially Amazon) evidence and explains mixed rating–outcome findings, making this 2006 JMKR study a plausible foundational comparison/source rather than an incidental mention.
